prompt: A long, narrow corridor stretches into the distance, its walls and ceiling showing signs of age and neglect. The floor is cracked concrete, with patches of moss and weeds pushing through the fissures. Along both sides, rusted metal barriers stand at intervals, their surfaces weathered and stained. A blue suitcase rests against the wall on the right. The walls are painted a faded white, peeling in places to reveal darker layers beneath. Fluorescent lights hang from the ceiling, casting a cool, dim glow. At the far end, a red sign with the word "EXIT" glows faintly, the only bright spot in the otherwise muted scene. The perspective draws the eye down the length of the passage, emphasizing its emptiness and the sense of isolation.The camera moves forward, steadily approaching the glowing exit sign. As it advances, the perspective shifts slightly, revealing more of the corridor's length and the repeating pattern of barriers and peeling paint. The blue suitcase remains a solitary object on the right, untouched. The cracks in the floor become more prominent, and the moss appears more vibrant under the artificial light. The atmosphere grows more claustrophobic, the walls seeming to close in as the camera nears the end of the passage. The red "EXIT" sign grows larger, its glow more intense, drawing the viewer's focus forward.
